title: Teapot & Depth of Field
blurb: The showpieces: the acceleration structure carrying a quarter-million triangles, and the lens model producing depth of field.

cards.title: Reflective Teapot
cards.desc: The Utah teapot at 229,921 triangles - reflective, on a reflective checkerboard floor. Only tractable because of the BVH acceleration structure.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  3x3 anti-aliasing (9 rays/pixel)  -  up to 6 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 13.8 s

cards.title: Depth of Field + Refraction
cards.desc: A glass sphere (refraction) in a Cornell-style room, shot through a lens focused mid-scene - the background blurs while the spheres stay sharp.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  10x10 lens samples (depth of field)  -  up to 6 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 3 min 1 s
